dim.name: nFmeDepthLevels
dim.description: Fixed maximum number of coarsened depth levels for FME depth coarsening. Samudra uses 19 levels; set to 25 to allow headroom.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_enable
nml_option.description: If true, ocean analysis member fmeDepthCoarsening is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the fmeDepthCoarsening analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_depth_bounds
nml_option.description: Comma-separated depth boundaries in meters for coarsened depth levels.
nml_option.possible_values: Comma-separated list of depth values in meters or 'none'

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_fields
nml_option.description: Comma-separated tracer names to coarsen in the vertical.
nml_option.possible_values: Comma-separated list of tracer field names or 'none'

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_horiz_remap_file
nml_option.description: Path to ESMF/TempestRemap weight file for horizontal remapping depth-coarsened fields to lat-lon grid. Each depth level is output as a separate 2D variable (e.g., temperatureCoarsened_0, temperatureCoarsened_1, ...).

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_stream_output_interval
nml_option.description: Output interval for the fmeDepthCoarsening stream. Format: YY-MM-DD_HH:MM:SS
nml_option.possible_values: Any valid MPAS time interval string

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeDepthCoarsening_time_averaging
nml_option.description: If true, remapped output fields are time-averaged over the output interval instead of instantaneous. Set compute_interval to a frequent value (e.g. dt) when enabling.

package.name: fmeDepthCoarseningAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the fmeDepthCoarsening analysis member.
